## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / build

## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...`, `go vet ./...`, and `go test ./...` pass
- [ ] `golangci-lint run ./...` is clean
- [ ] Frontend builds (`cd web && npm run build`) — if UI changed
- [ ] Regenerated code committed (`make proto` / `make sqlc`) — if proto/SQL changed
- [ ] Migration + `schema.sql` mirror updated together — if the DB schema changed
- [ ] New i18n keys added to all 8 languages — if UI strings changed
- [ ] Docs / CHANGELOG updated where relevant

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->
